mapper.sql: id, proj_id, detail, sys_no,apply, mid_date, midcheck_flag, midcheck_state, midcheck_opinion, checker, check_date, check_no, midcheck_info_id
mapper.select: select spm.id as rowId, spm.proj_id as "projId.id",spi.name as "projId.name",spi.name as projName, spm.midcheck_opinion as midcheckOpinion,spm.midcheck_opinion2 as midcheckOpinion2, spm.midcheck_opinion3 as midcheckOpinion3,spm.midcheck_opinion4 as midcheckOpinion4, spm.midcheck_state as midcheckState, spm.midcheck_info_id as "midcheckInfoId.id",spmi.midcheck_info as "midcheckInfoId.name",spmi.midcheck_info as midcheckInfoName from srm_project_midcheck spm left join srm_projects_info spi on spi.id=spm.proj_id left join srm_project_midcheck_list_info spmi on spmi.id=spm.midcheck_info_id where spm.id=#{rowId}
mapper.update:
update srm_project_midcheck
midcheck_state = #{status},
midcheck_flag = #{checkStatus},
where id=#{rowId}
mapper.select: select spm.id from srm_project_midcheck spm where spm.proj_id=#{projId}
